hooks.command: P=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$P" in *__pycache__*|*.pyc) exit 0 ;; */utils/*.py|*/bin/*|*/data/*.json|*/data/*/*.json|*/CLAUDE.md) REL=${P##*/prodtools/}; jq -n --arg p "$REL" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Edited " + $p + " this turn. If it adds a new abstraction, extends an existing one, or captures a decision with rationale, run /wiki-ingest to record it. Otherwise ignore.")}}' ;; esac

O=$(jq -r '.tool_response.stdout // .tool_response.output // ""'); HITS=$(echo "$O" | grep -oE 'Art has completed and will exit with status 0|Declare SAM for [^ ]+|pushOutput status at exit: 0' | head -3); if [ -n "$HITS" ]; then jq -n --arg h "$HITS" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("Wiki-worthy signal in Bash output:\n" + $h + "\nIf this represents a new capability, bug fix, or decision (not just a repeat test), consider /wiki-ingest.")}}'; fi; exit 0
